guide: To gain passively progress in this
you should have a pet equipped at all times.
Don't forget to use pet items that boost
their XP-gain. Things like Milestone Rewards
(Commission, Garden, Bestiary Milestones)
and Pet Candies will be a good help here.
Even a Lvl 100 pet counts.
Once you acquire a Void Sword and a decent
armor like Ender or Glacite this should be
fairly easy to do.

note: Gain coins from the Scavenger Enchant
guide: Apply/Use the highest tier of Scavenger
that you can get your hands on and put it
on your main weapon. Gifts from the Jerry Island
can be a way to obtain Scavenger IV books.
You can also use the weapon drops from dungeon mobs
as those have guaranteed Scavenger 5.
Mine normal or Pure Ores in the Dwarven Mines.
You might want to use HotM perks that reward
Mining Speed/Spread aswell as armor, pet and
tools that do so.
For this you will need Combat 15.
To blow up crypts you can use
class abilities (Tank, Archer, Mage)
and/or Superboom TNTs that drop
from slaying Minibosses in dungeons
and can be bought from Walther in
The Deep Caverns or Ophelia in
The Dungeon Hub.
You will get the Rock Pet by mining 2.5k
Ore Blocks. Keep in mind that Stone doesn't
count for this. Don't forget to equip the pet ;)
Optimal tool:
Advanced Gardening Axe (25 copper)
Make a full plot of Cocoa Beans (16716 needed
or 105 enchanted) in The Garden (SkyBlock Level 5).
You will need Garden Level 8.
Get the Cocoa Beans to plant from The Desert Island.
You will most likely get this passively.
Use /be ingame to view your progress once you
talked to Bramass Beastslayer in The Spiders Den.
You should either kill Endermen in
End using your Void Sword (200k) and
Ender Armor for this (buy the Ender Training
Perk from Tyzzo next to the Draconic Altar)
or Spiders in the Spiders Den with a Cleave 5
weapon. You might want to also use the free
Combat XP from Bestiary Milestones for this
aswell as the XP from /mobtypes.
Mine emeralds in the Dwarven Mines
using the Pure Emerald Veins.
Requires 32 Enchanted Emeralds and
Emerald Collection 5 to craft.
You can use all your minion slots for this,
(buy your daily Obsidian in the End to craft)
mine Ender Nodes and kill Obsidian Defenders.
If you're using minions, make sure to give them
the best fuel and storage you have access to
and collect in time.
Ways to obtain:
Craft (Lapis Lazuli Collection 5),
a drop from fishing,
from the Experimentation Table,
drop from Ender Nodes in the End (11-13%).
Fish in the Hub until you can enter the Backwater Bayou.
Fish there and lootshare mobs until you unlock
Fishing Minions. Place as many of them on your island,
as you can and give them the best fuel and storage
you have access to and don't forget to collect in time.
Recommended for this are:
Bingo, Rock, Grandma Wolf,
Enderman, Horse, Jerry,
Chicken, Silverfish and Bee.
Some of them require certain
collections and materials to craft.
This unlocks at 1k Mushroom Collection.
You can get that by farming the Mushrooms
in the Mushroom Desert.
Obtain the needed Glowstone by buying a
Glowstone Block from the Builder and breaking
it on your island.

note: Obtain a Silver+ medal from Jacobs Contest
guide: Do contests like Wheat, Potato or Carrot.
You can also try to utilize pests to help here.
Kill farm animals in the Barn with a Cleaver
with Cleave 5 and Sharpness 5
or spiders in Arachne's Burrow
in the Spider's Den with a Dreadlord Sword.
You can also use the Bingo Enderman Farm
showcased by Foraging Mommy on YouTube.
You can unlock 17/17 Farming Collections,
6/11 Combat Collections, 6/6 Foraging Collections,
14/22 Mining Collections for a total of 43 collections.
You will also get some Fishing Collections.
Craft Leather, Iron, Gold and Diamond Armor
Buy Angler Armor (8 pieces) from Fishing Merchant
Craft Leaflet, Farm Suit, Mushroom and Cactus Armor
Buy Squire, Rosetta's, Celeste and Starlight Armor from Rosetta
Reforge your Void Sword to Sharp
at the Blacksmith in the Hub or
enchant any weapon with Critical 5 (50 Levels).
For this you can either do:
- 1 t1, t2 and 2 t3 or
- 1 t1 and 8 t2
and claim the rewards by talking to Maddox.
Complete a Floor 1 with a score of 230+
and buy the chest afterwards. If you can't buy
immediately, either save money and buy it from
Croesus within the next 2 days or do another run.
You will probably need help with this.
Do your daily Experimentation Tables
after getting Enchanting Level 10.
Talk to Guildford in the Dungeon Hub
and complete 4/4 objectives of any race.
Don't forget to talk to Guildford
after each run you do.
Mine Ender Nodes in The End until you get one.
It has a 1.31% chance to drop from Obsidian Nodes.
You need Combat Level 12 to get there.
